Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: plain

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   63              <Button
   64                variant={ButtonVariant.plain}
   65                aria-label={t('Remove')}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 63
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: FlexItem

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   62            <FlexItem>
   63              <Button
   64                variant={ButtonVariant.plain}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 48
Rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

Code context:

```
   49          <Flex alignItems={{ default: 'alignItemsFlexEnd' }} marginWidth={20}>

```

I'll start by analyzing each fix, then read the file to apply them.

**Fix 1**: `Button.variant` type changed - but the value used is `plain` which is valid in both old and new types. No code change needed.

**Fix 2**: Icon children in `<Button>` need to move to the `icon` prop. Need to see what's between the Button tags.

**Fix 3**: `PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` - "light" is no longer valid, should be replaced with "default" (which is the closest match to "light").

Let me read the file:

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Line 64): `variant={ButtonVariant.plain}` — The value `plain` exists in both old and new type unions. No change needed.

**Fix 2** (Line 63): The `<Button>` contains only `<MinusCircleIcon />` as a child (line 68). This is an icon-only button, so the icon should move to the `icon` prop and the Button should become self-closing.

**Fix 3** (Line 48): `PageSectionVariants.light` → should become `"default"` since `"light"` is no longer valid and `"default"` is the closest semantic replacement. I also need to check if `PageSectionVariants` is still used elsewhere — if not, remove the import.

Let me apply all changes:
Now `PageSectionVariants` is no longer used anywhere. Let me remove it from the import:

  TextInput,
  Title,

content.text: Let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. All changes are applied cleanly.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed (`plain`) | **No change needed** | The value `ButtonVariant.plain` is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option; no existing values were removed. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **Applied** | Moved `<MinusCircleIcon />` from Button children to the `icon` prop. The `<Button>` element is now self-closing (`/>`) since it had only the icon as a child. (Lines 62–67) |
| Fix 3 | `sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light` | **Applied** | Changed `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` to `variant="default"` — `"default"` is the semantic replacement for the removed `"light"` value. Removed the now-unused `PageSectionVariants` import from `@patternfly/react-core`. (Line 47, import block) |
